titleStmt.title: SII 5.432: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 432. (A.R. No. 141 of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumukappaṭi tribhu vaṉackra vatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ kiḻvempunāṭṭu tirunelveliuṭaiyār tiru n
elveliuṭaiyār tirumuṉpu piḷḷaikaḷil cuntarapāṇṭiyatevar puraṭṭāci mātattil tāma piṟantanāḷ mulamutal ciṟukālaiccantii
le nāḷtoṟum śrīrudrāddhya yaṉam paṇṇivippatāṉa māṭapocai govindabha ṭṭaṟkkum Iruṅkiṇṭi Āṇṭāṉbha ṭṭaso mayājiyārk
kum pākaḷūr Ulakamuṇṭāṉbha ṭṭarkkum Aḷḷūr yajña nārāyaṇabha ṭṭaṟkkum coṭṭai Aruḷāḷapperumāḷbha ṭṭaṟkkum sībhasai śrīkṛṣṇabha ṭṭa
ṟkkum gomaṭha ttu(p)bhu patibha ṭṭa bra haspa tisa vaiyājiyāṟkkumThe word ceṭṭalūr seems to have been engraved first and then altered into māṭapocai; the existing traces admit the alternate reading ceṭṭalūcai.ceṭṭapo cai Aruḷāḷapperumāḷbha ṭṭaṟkkum puḷḷalūṟ yādavabha ṭṭaṟkkum Iruṅkaṇṭi caurippe
rumāḷbha ṭṭasoma yājiyāṟkkum vaṅkippuṟattu nampibha ṭṭaṟkkum taṅkaḷukku bho- jaṉamuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavukku Innāyaṉār tevatāṉa minnāṭṭuk kuṉṟa
ttūril maḻavarāyaṉ taṅkaināccikkuk kāṇiyāy nammuḻavāṉa nilattil kārpacāṉam viḷaiyum talaivaricai nilattil rājarājavākkālukku teṟkku vatikku meṟku muta
l kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñcey nilam Orumāvum Añcāñcey nilam Araimāvum Āṟāñ cey nila mukkāṇiyum Eṭṭāñcey nilam Orumāvum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutalccey ni
la morumāvum muṉṟāñcey nilam Araimāvum Eḻāñcey nila maraimāvum Eṭṭāñcey nilam Orumāvum Oṉpatāñcey nilam Orumāvum muṉṟāṅkaṇṉāṟṟu mutalcey nila
m Araimāvum muṉṟāñcey nila maraimāvum Āṟāñcey nila mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutalcey nilam Orumāvum Iraṇṭāñcey nilam Orumāvum muṉṟāñ
cey nila maraimāvum nālāñcey nila mukkāṇiyum Añcāñceyum Āṟāñceyum nilam Orumāvum Eḻāñcey nilam Orumāvum Añcāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutalcey nilamarai
māvum Añcāñcey nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Añcāñ cey nilam kāṇiyum Eḻāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñcey nilam Oru māvumāka Ivvūraḷavukolāl ni
la mukkāle Orumāvaraiyum Innāyaṉārkku Iṟukkum kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum paṇṭāṭu paḻanaṭai Iṟuppatāka nammuḻavu tavirttu Ivvāṇṭu puraṭṭāti mātam mutal kārāṇmai
yum poṉvariyum viṉiyokamum taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavārāṭcciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupiliyum sandhivigra happeṟum vācalpeṟum Ilāñciṉaipeṟum maṟṟum Eppe
ṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭppaṭa śrīrudrāddhya yaṉappuṟam Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṇum Eṉṟu kāliṅkarāyaṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ittirunelveliyuṭaiyār tirumuṉpu paṇikaḷil cun
tarapāṇṭiyatevar puraṭṭātimāta(mt)ttil tām piṟantanāḷ mulam mutal nāḷtoṟum śrīrudrāddhya yaṉam paṇṇuvippatāka taṅkaḷukku bho jaṉamuḷḷuuṭṭuRead muḷḷiṭṭu. veṇṭuvaṉavukku Innāyaṉā
ṟ tevatāṉam Innāṭṭu kuṉṟattūril maḻavarāyaṉ taṅkaināccikkuk kāṇiyāy nammuḻavāṉa nilattil kārpacāṉam viḷaiyum talaivaricai nilattil Ivvūraḷavukolāl nilam mukkāle O
ru māvaraiyum Innāyaṉāṟkku Iṟukkum kaṭamaiyum mantarāyamum paṇṭāṭu paḻanaṭai Iṟuppatāka nammuḻavu taviṟttuk kārāṇmaiyum poṉvariyum viṉiyokamum(n)taru
vatāṉa Accum kāriyavārāṭcciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupiliyum sandhivigra happeṟum vācalppeṟum Ilāñciṉaippeṟum maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭaṉavum Uṭ paṭa Ivvāṇṭu
Immātam mutal śrīrudrāddhya yaṉappuṟam Iṟaiyiliyāka tantom . yippaṭi cantrādityavat celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭivittukkoḷka Ivai miḻalaikkūṟṟattu naṭuviṟ
kkūṟṟu śrīparāntakanallūr Iruṇamuṭaiyāṉ tirumuṭicūṭṭiṉāṉ kuyantai Āḻvāṉāṉa ceṉāvaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 9vatu nāḷ muṉṉūṟu Ivai miḻalaikkūṟṟattu naṭuvilkkū
ṟṟu viḷāṅkāṭṭurāṉa vikkra macoḻanallūr ciṟantavāṉcuṭar tiruvikkra maṉāṉa villavarāyaṉeṉ Eḻuttu Ivai karuṅkuṭināṭṭu vicaiyaṉ kuṭiyiruṇikki tirukkāṉapperuṭaiyāṉāṉa pa
ḻantiparāya ṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.432 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
